name: GitHub Actions Executor
description: Executes heavy-compute tasks via GitHub Actions. Ideal for running tests, building Docker images, or data processing. Requires a GitHub Token.

tools.name: executor-github.runWorkflow
tools.description: Creates and triggers a GitHub Actions workflow to perform a task. Returns the workflow run ID.

workflowYaml.description: The YAML content for the GitHub Actions workflow.

workflowName.description: A descriptive name for the workflow file (e.g., 'fleet-test-run.yml').

tools.name: executor-github.getRunStatus
tools.description: Checks the status of a previously triggered GitHub Actions workflow run.

runId.description: The ID of the workflow run to check.

tools.name: executor-github.fetchArtifacts
tools.description: Downloads artifacts from a completed GitHub Actions workflow run and saves them to the Fleet artifact store.

runId.description: The ID of the workflow run to fetch artifacts from.

configFields.label: GitHub Token
configFields.description: Personal Access Token with 'repo' and 'workflow' scopes.
